---
title: regularizeNd
---

This page is the home for a full tutorial series on regularizeNd and one deep-dive technical article.

## Tutorial Series

1. [Part 1: Introduction and Intuition](part-01-introduction-and-intuition.qmd)
2. [Part 2: 1D Smoothing and Parameter Tuning](part-02-1d-smoothing-and-parameter-tuning.qmd)
3. [Part 3: Interpolation and Solver Behavior](part-03-interpolation-and-solver-behavior.qmd)
4. [Part 4: Boundary Behavior and Convex Hull](part-04-boundary-behavior-and-convex-hull.qmd)
5. [Part 5: Scaling to 4D and Beyond](part-05-scaling-to-4d-and-beyond.qmd)
6. [Part 6: Constraints and Mappings](part-06-constraints-and-mappings.qmd)
7. [Part 7: Iterative Solvers and Memory Strategy](part-07-iterative-solvers-and-memory-strategy.qmd)
8. [Part 8: Lineage and Practical Migration Notes](part-08-lineage-and-practical-migration-notes.qmd)

## Deep-Dive Scientific Article

- [Deep-Dive: regularizeNd Design](deep-dive-regularizeNd-design.qmd)

## Notes

- This section currently targets website pages only.
- Integration into regularizeNd docs is deferred.

## Attribution and Other Reference Series

This series is inspired by Math for Mere Mortals educational progression on regularization and related historical tools including gridfit and RegularizeData3D. The tutorial list below is excellent background reading. Flip through it and see if its helpful to you before reading.

1. [Introduction to Regularizing with 2D Data – Part 1 of 3](https://mathformeremortals.wordpress.com/2013/01/29/introduction-to-regularizing-with-2d-data-part-1-of-3/)
2. [Introduction to Regularizing with 2D Data – Part 2 of 3](https://mathformeremortals.wordpress.com/2013/01/31/introduction-to-regularizing-with-2d-data-part-2-of-3/)
3. [Introduction to Regularizing with 2D Data – Part 3 of 3](https://mathformeremortals.wordpress.com/2013/01/31/introduction-to-regularizing-with-2d-data-part-3-of-3/)
4. [RegularizeData2D, the Excel Spreadsheet Function for Regularizing 2D Data – Part 1 of 2](https://mathformeremortals.wordpress.com/2013/02/13/regularizedata2d-the-excel-spreadsheet-function-for-regularizing-2d-data-part-1-of-2/)
5. [RegularizeData2D, the Excel Spreadsheet Function for Regularizing 2D Data – Part 2 of 2](https://mathformeremortals.wordpress.com/2013/02/17/regularizedata2d-the-excel-spreadsheet-function-for-regularizing-2d-data-part-2-of-2/)
6. [Introduction to Regularizing 3D Data – Part 1 of 2](https://mathformeremortals.wordpress.com/2013/07/22/introduction-to-regularizing-3d-data-part-1-of-2/)
7. [Introduction to Regularizing 3D Data – Part 2 of 2](https://mathformeremortals.wordpress.com/2013/07/24/introduction-to-regularizing-3d-data-part-2-of-2/)
